The '''Siege of [[Trasemene]]''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] victory,<ref name="GFT" /> won by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Miltin Takel]]. Takel's use of [[Glitterstim/Legends|glitterstim]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] proved invaluable in obtaining that victory.<ref name="Insider" /> In later years, the victory would be one of many that a player could simulate on [[Plescinia Entertainments/Legends|Plescinia Entertainments]]' [[CS-Mark 10]] Imperial Command Combat Simulator.<ref name="GFT" />
